source_pr.title: test: merge serial tests in cmd, planner, server, util
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: None

Problem Summary: After #30692, all the tests are run in serial. The names of *_serial_test.go are no longer appropriate.

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: - CGO_ENABLED=1 tools/bin/gotestsum --junitfile "$(TEST_COVERAGE_DIR)/tidb-junit-report.xml" -- -v -p $(P) --race \ | tk.MustQuery("explain format='brief' select * from t force index(i) where id <= 1024 and c1 >= 0 and c1 <= 1024 and c2 in (2, 4, 6, 8) order by c1 limit 960").Check(kit.Rows( (planner/core/plan_test.go)
failure_signature: - CGO_ENABLED=1 tools/bin/gotestsum --junitfile "$(TEST_COVERAGE_DIR)/tidb-junit-report.xml" -- -v -p $(P) --race \ | tk.MustQuery("explain format='brief' select * from t force index(i) where id <= 1024 and c1 >= 0 and c1 <= 1024 and c2 in (2, 4, 6, 8) order by c1 limit 960").Check(kit.Rows( (planner/core/plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: - CGO_ENABLED=1 tools/bin/gotestsum --junitfile "$(TEST_COVERAGE_DIR)/tidb-junit-report.xml" -- -v -p $(P) --race \ | tk.MustQuery("explain format='brief' select * from t force index(i) where id <= 1024 and c1 >= 0 and c….
